message:
feat(bench): full commit path phase timing (A/B/C1/C2)

Add instrumentation for ALL phases of the commit path, not just the
group commit portion:
- phase_A: prepare under inner.lock (write_set building, page1 update)
- phase_B: WAL group commit (consolidator + I/O + waiter wait)
- phase_C1: post-commit metadata under inner.lock
- phase_C2: publish to snapshot plane

Key finding: at 16 threads, commit is only 8% of wall-clock time.
INSERT execution (B-tree traversal, page allocation, MVCC snapshot
checks) consumes 92%. Further commit path optimization yields
diminishing returns — INSERT perf is the real bottleneck.

Phase C1 (1µs) and C2 (8µs) confirm the double-lock fix is effective.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
